name.description: Unique identifier for the federate name
name.title: Name

deltat.description: Co-simulation time step interval in seconds
deltat.title: Time Step (s)

max_itr.description: Maximum number of ADMM iterations per step
max_itr.title: Max Itr

switches.description: List of switches/controllable lines in the area
switches.title: Switches

relaxed.description: Boolean flag to enable relaxed model formulation
relaxed.title: Relaxed

rho_sup.description: ADMM penalty parameter for active power injection
rho_sup.title: Rho Sup

rho_vup.description: ADMM penalty parameter for upstream voltage
rho_vup.title: Rho Vup

rho_sdn.description: ADMM penalty parameter for active/reactive power flow discrepancy
rho_sdn.title: Rho Sdn

rho_vdn.description: ADMM penalty parameter for downstream voltage discrepancy
rho_vdn.title: Rho Vdn

vup_tol.description: Convergence tolerance for upstream voltage mismatch
vup_tol.title: Vup Tol
